## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Publishing Operations Specialist role with candidate Jordan Ferraz, exploring their background and the job responsibilities.](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jordan has a diverse background in technology, communication, and web development, with experience in content management and integration across various platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [The role involves creating and managing publishing workflows for multiple clients, adapting to various CMSs and client needs, and focusing on automation and efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [The company's work environment is fast-paced, requiring flexibility and quick adaptation to evolving client needs and technological advancements.](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [There's a strong emphasis on collaboration with the engineering team and proactive problem-solving to improve publishing processes.](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

## Topics

### Jordan's Background and Experience

  - [10+ years in technology and communication (radio, TV, internet, web)](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Currently a front-end developer specializing in WordPress](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Experience with various CMS platforms (legacy, headless, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Acts as a link between marketing, SEO, and developer teams](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Journalist background provides additional perspective on content](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Recent focus on applying AI and automation to daily tasks](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### Role Responsibilities and Challenges

  - [Creating publishing workflows for diverse client needs (40+ clients, 20+ CMSs)](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [Adapting to both modern and legacy systems](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Developing automation solutions for content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Integrating with internal tools (Atlas, Temporal) for workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Collaborating with engineering team to build and improve publishing processes](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Staying agile and updating processes frequently as tools and needs evolve](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Ensuring high-quality execution to maintain client brand equity](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Company Workflow and Tools

  - [Internal platform called Atlas for building pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [Backend powered by Temporal (Flow Studio)](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Combination of automated and manual publishing processes](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [No dedicated QA team; peer review and self-testing are important](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [8-12 week onboarding sprint process for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
  - [Pod structure for ongoing client management (director, managing editor, content manager)](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)

### Publishing Scenarios and Solutions

  - [Range from API-based publishing to creating custom solutions for legacy systems](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO involving template creation and bulk page publishing](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Adapting to various client preferences (staging, direct publishing, document delivery)](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Potential for expanding into social media publishing automation](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jordan to potentially explore Temporal framework further](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Company to continue interview process with other team members](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [Jordan to email any additional questions that may arise](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)
  - [Further discussions on specific client scenarios and technical solutions as needed](https://fathom.video/share/zgioxsT_MW6gyT3XWpkyKDqyxVYhrCmk?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
